sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الطِّفْلَةُ سُكَيْنَةُ مَرِيضَةً وَلَمْ تَنَمْ جَيِّدًا.
sentences.translation: Mala Sukejna je bila bolesna i nije dobro spavala.
sentences.translationEn: The girl Sukayna was sick and did not sleep well.

sentences.translation: Majka je sjedila kraj nje cijelu noć.
sentences.translationEn: Her mother sat beside her all night.

sentences.translation: Dala joj je lijek i ispričala joj priču.
sentences.translationEn: She gave her the medicine and told her a story.

sentences.arabic: فِي الصَّبَاحِ انْخَفَضَتِ الْحَرَارَةُ وَابْتَسَمَتْ سُكَيْنَةُ.
sentences.translation: Ujutro je temperatura opala i Sukejne se nasmiješila.
sentences.translationEn: In the morning the temperature went down and Sukayna smiled.
